Gender Equality.reason: The course covers the "平等原則" (principle of equality), a legal foundation for non-discrimination, which relates to Target 5.1 and 5.c.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: Discusses "法治與政府人事制度" (Rule of law and government personnel system) and rights protection for civil servants, linking to Target 8.8 (protect labour rights).

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: A reading on "BOT契約的法律性質" (The legal nature of BOT contracts) directly addresses the legal framework for infrastructure projects, linking to Target 9.1.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The course teaches the "平等原則" (principle of equality) as a general principle of public law, which is fundamental to Target 10.3 (ensure equal opportunity).

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: A reading on "regulation in Taipei City hall" connects the principles of administrative law to urban management, which is relevant to Target 11.3.
evidence: The social life of regulation in Taipei City hall

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course is fundamentally about the "法治國原則" (principle of the rule of law) and "依法行政" (acting according to law), which are the core of Targets 16.3, 16.5, and 16.6.

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: Discusses "BOT契約" (BOT contracts), a form of public-private partnership (Target 17.17), and compares legal systems, relating to international cooperation and knowledge sharing (Target 17.6).
